nasb.text: More than the sounds of many waters, Than the mighty breakers of the sea, The Lord on high is mighty.

esv.text: Mightier than the thunders of many waters, mightier than the waves of the sea, the Lord  on high is mighty!

cnv.text: 耶和華在高處大有能力， 勝過大水的響聲， 勝過海中的巨浪。

ccb.text: 高天之上的耶和华充满力量， 超过咆哮的洪水和怒吼的大海。

csbs.text: 耶和华在至高处大有能力， 胜过众水的声音， 胜过海洋巨大的波浪！
